question: What should I expect in a massage session?
answer: During a massage session, you can expect a personalized experience tailored to your needs. Sessions typically begin with a brief consultation to discuss your goals and any areas of concern. You will be guided on how to get comfortable on the massage table, and I will use techniques suited to your body and preferences. Sessions may include a combination of various techniques. The environment is designed to be relaxing and supportive, allowing you to fully unwind and benefit from the therapeutic touch.
